attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT 
B.OBJ_ID0
,B.SUBSCRIPTION_CODE
,B.CCW_ORDER_LINE_ID
,B.ITEM_ID
,B.SUBSCRIPTION_RENEW_CNT
,B.SUBSCR_CREDIT
,B.CURRENCY_CODE
,B.SUBSCR_MONTHLY_CREDIT
,B.SUBSCRIPTION_LINE_START_DT
,B.SUBSCRIPTION_LINE_END_DT
,B.END_COMPLETE_DATE
,B.STATUS
,B.QUANTITY
,B.UNIQUE_ID
,B.INSTANCE_ID
,B.INTENDED_USE
,B.WEB_ORDER_ID
,B.LINKED_LINE_REF_NUMBER
,B.LAST_MODIFIED_DATE
,B.SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME
,B.REFRESH_DATETIME
,B.SOURCE_DML_TYPE
,B.FULLY_QUALIFIED_TABLE_NAME 
,B.TRAIL_POSITION 
,B.TOKEN
 ,B.REFRESH_DAY	
 ,B.FLEXUP_FLAG
 ,B.STRATEGIC_CLASS
,B.STRATEGIC_INTENT
FROM 
$$ACCUMSTGDB.STG_CISCO_SUBSCR_LINES_DETAILS B,
(
SELECT OBJ_ID0,INSTANCE_ID,REFRESH_DATETIME FROM $$ACCUMSTGDB.STG_CISCO_SUBSCR_LINES_DETAILS
MINUS
SELECT OBJ_ID0,INSTANCE_ID,REFRESH_DATETIME   FROM $$NRTACCUMVWDB.CISCO_SUBSCR_LINES_DETAILS
) A
WHERE 
 A.OBJ_ID0 = B.OBJ_ID0 AND A.REFRESH_DATETIME=B.REFRESH_DATETIME
AND A.INSTANCE_ID=B.INSTANCE_ID
